title: 'I, Vadasseri Damodara Menon Satheesan': Why Kerala CM's name sparked Congress unease
content: Kerala CM VD Satheesan faces a political storm over using his full legal name, including 'Menon', during his oath. Critics within his party argue it contradicts the Congress's secular image and signals caste politics. Satheesan defended the move, stating it was to honor his late parents, not a political statement.

title: 'Not essential part of Eid': Calcutta HC refuses to stay curbs on cattle slaughter
content: The Calcutta High Court has upheld the West Bengal government's restrictions on slaughtering certain animals ahead of Bakr Eid. The court found the notification aligned with previous directives, emphasizing that cow sacrifice isn't a mandatory Islamic practice. Authorities must now decide on exemptions within 24 hours, ensuring proper certification and infrastructure for any permitted slaughter.

title: Umar Khalid moves Delhi HC for bail after trial court rejects 'unreasonable' plea
content: Umar Khalid has approached the Delhi High Court seeking 15 days' interim bail to attend his uncle's Chehlum ceremony and care for his mother undergoing surgery. A trial court had previously denied his request, deeming the ceremony "not that necessary" and suggesting other family members could assist.

title: Jeff Bezos vs NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani: How Amazon founder’s comment Mamdani ‘angry’
content: Jeff Bezos stated that doubling his taxes wouldn't significantly help a Queens teacher, sparking a retort from NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani. Bezos proposed eliminating federal income tax for lower earners, arguing "zero is a better number than $1." He also criticized New York City's spending, not its billionaires, as the core issue.

title: 'Melody' moment: How Italy became the heart of India's Europe bet
content: India is pivoting towards Europe as traditional partnerships become unreliable. The burgeoning India-Italy relationship, spearheaded by Prime Ministers Modi and Meloni, is central to this strategy. This partnership is building crucial economic architecture, including the India-Middle East-Europe Economic Corridor and a potential EU Free Trade Agreement, positioning Europe as India's primary strategic focus.

title: US-Iran war: Will rupee hit 100 versus US dollar soon?
content: ​Rupee depreciation is not new, what is new however is the rapid pace at which it is falling. It’s the biggest risk for India’s external sector resilience at the moment. In just over a year, the rupee has depreciated over 14%.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's email to employees has a 'goodbye note' for those laid off
content: Meta has initiated significant layoffs, sending emails to thousands of employees whose positions are being eliminated.  Company leadership confirmed the decision to reduce headcount for increased efficiency.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg also sent a company-wide memo expressing gratitude to departing employees and outlining future company direction.  He assured remaining staff that no further company-wide layoffs are expected this year.

title: Avalanche’s Cale Makar injury update sparks concern in NHL playoff
content: Colorado Avalanche defenseman Cale Makar has been a growing injury concern during the current NHL playoffs after suffering an upper-body injury in the last round. There is no definitive timetable for a return from the franchise, casting doubt over his availability moving forward. The loss of Makar could have a huge effect on Colorado’s defensive stability, transition game and overall Stanley Cup hopes this postseason.

title: Injury scare for CSK! Sanju Samson leaves field mid-match vs Gujarat Titans
content: Chennai Super Kings' Sanju Samson sustained an early finger injury during their IPL 2026 match against Gujarat Titans, forcing him off the field. The incident occurred in the second over while attempting to stop a wide delivery. Urvil Patel took over wicketkeeping duties as Samson received medical attention.

title: Google co-founder Sergey Brin donates $500,000 to group fighting ‘overpaid CEO tax’
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.

title: Hello Mr Robinson: Why Great Britain is singing a former football hooligan's tune
content: The various British establishments, from Church to Parliament to Royalty, are peculiarly adept at absorbing dissenting views, with the brief interruption of Cromwell. That makes it rather odd that a former football hooligan from a working-class background now holds Britain’s most powerful microphone, with talking points amplified by Elon Musk, who Robinson says also pays his legal bills, and views in complete coherence with his MAGA cousins across the pond.

title: Iran unfazed by US strikes? Tehran rebuilding military faster than expected, producing drones
content: US intelligence suggests Iran is rapidly rebuilding military capabilities, including drone production, within months, raising doubts about the long-term effectiveness of US-Israeli strikes.  This rapid recovery, potentially aided by Russia and China, occurs amid ongoing tensions over Iran's nuclear program and significant US military losses during Operation Epic Fury.

title: Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce NYC wedding sparks $250K security backlash
content: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are keeping things private as they gear up to tie the knot on 3rd July in New York City as they have reportedly amped up security for themselves and their high profile event. While other parties across the world have been reportedly planned, it seems their wedding in New York City has taken a new turn.

title: Coco Gauff addresses 'angry' fan claims after awkward French Open clip
content: American tennis star Coco Gauff once again became the center of discussion on Instagram. A video of her arriving for the French Open is going viral on social media. The World No4 was seen entering the Roland Garros complex alongside her team while carrying her bags. However, her uneasy facial expression and awkward smile quickly led fans to speculate about her mood ahead of the tournament.

title: Maxx Crosby, Trey Hendrickson react to Bill Rosinski’s Ravens snub
content: Play-by-play announcer Bill Rosinski shared his rejection letter from the Baltimore Ravens on X. They cited a vague reason for not aligning with the position’s requirements. This sparked online debate. Some commenters linked his rejection to the team’s recent player acquisitions concerning Maxx Crosby and Trey Hendrickson. While some blamed AI, HR, and others. Some dismissed Rosinski’s letter, saying it was a regular rejection letter.

title: Shubman Gill-Sudharsan script history, equal Kohli-Gayle's massive T20 feat
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan achieved their 10th century partnership in T20s, equalling a record held by legendary pairs. They reached this milestone in just 46 innings, significantly faster than others. The Gujarat Titans duo also set an IPL record with their seventh opening century stand.

title: 'Never write them off': Former cricketer backs Kohli, Rohit to push for 2027 WC
content: Kohli and Rohit retired from Test cricket last year and now only play ODI cricket for India. Apart from international matches, most of their cricket now comes in the IPL.

title: Unified RERA portal launched: What it means for buyers, project transparency
content: A new unified RERA portal now centralises real estate project information nationwide, offering homebuyers unprecedented transparency and ease of access. Buyers can now verify project registrations, builder compliance, and complaint statuses on a single platform, simplifying the purchasing process and reducing reliance on builder claims. This initiative aims to streamline data and empower consumers.

title: Donald Trump-backed UFC star seeks release to join Jake Paul’s MVP MMA
content: Paulo Costa has openly floated the possibility of leaving the UFC after revealing interest in a Netflix-backed fight against Mike Perry under Jake Paul’s MVP MMA banner. The comments come amid growing attention surrounding MVP MMA’s early success, increasing crossover opportunities and wider questions about whether rival promotions can now seriously challenge the UFC’s dominance in combat sports.

title: Swaroop Sampat credits Aditya Dhar for her grey hair, praises ‘Dhurandhar’
content: Swaroop Sampat Rawal expressed her admiration for director Aditya Dhar, calling him the "coolest person to work with." She recalled how discussions about 'Uri: The Surgical Strike' were constant in her household before she joined the film. Rawal also revealed her desire to work with her entire family in a future film, ideally directed by Dhar.

title: ‘Enriched uranium must remain in Iran’: Khamenei rejects key US demand; peace talks falter
content: Iran's Supreme Leader has ordered the country's near-weapons-grade enriched uranium stockpile to remain within Iran, complicating peace talks. This directive hardens Tehran's stance, as the US and Israel demand its removal. The move comes amid ongoing regional conflict and deep suspicion of further US airstrikes.

title: Buyer gets Rs 5.1 lakh compensation after bike spends 294 days in workshop
content: A Coimbatore consumer commission has taken a firm stand against Royal Enfield and one of its dealers, mandating them to pay ₹5.1 lakh to a buyer whose Continental GT 650 was plagued by continuous defects. The motorcycle endured over 294 days of repairs, yet the persistent mechanical and electrical failures remained unresolved, causing the owner significant inconvenience and financial strain.

title: Planning to buy a Maruti? Prices set to rise by up to Rs 30,000 from June
content: Maruti Suzuki India will increase vehicle prices by up to Rs 30,000 starting June 2026 due to persistent inflationary pressures and adverse cost environments. The company has made efforts to mitigate rising costs but must now pass on a portion of these expenses to customers. This price revision affects the entire vehicle portfolio.

title: Rs 14.20 crore player dropped! CSK make major changes for GT clash
content: Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad won the toss and chose to bowl against Gujarat Titans. This is a crucial match for CSK in IPL 2026. Ruturaj Gaikwad made two changes to the playing XI. Gujarat Titans have already qualified for the playoffs. Shubman Gill made one change for Gujarat Titans.

title: Middle East crisis: 58,500 LPG users shift to PNG, 96% deliveries verified
content: Amid Middle East tensions, the government assures stable LPG supplies with 96% DAC-based deliveries and 99% online bookings. Adequate petrol, diesel, and LPG stocks are available nationwide. Citizens are urged to avoid panic buying and conserve energy, with over 5,000 raids conducted against hoarding. Maritime operations remain normal, and all Indian seafarers in the Gulf are safe.

title: Why thousands of women across India are still being lost to dowry violence
content: Dowry deaths persist in India despite being outlawed, with women facing relentless demands for cash and property, often leading to violence and suicide. This practice, deeply rooted in power and control, continues across all social strata, highlighting a societal failure beyond legal reform.

title: 'Won’t stop until Pradhan resigns': Rahul targets Centre over NEET paper leak
content: Rahul Gandhi has demanded Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan's resignation over the NEET paper leak, accusing the Centre of neglecting student concerns. He pledged the Congress's continued fight for affected students, advocating for a robust examination system.

title: 'Tension nahi lene ka': Vaibhav Sooryavanshi' message to Sangakkara before 10 sixes carnage
content: Rajasthan Royals' 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi delivered a match-winning 93 off 38 balls, including 10 sixes, to chase down 221 against LSG.  He reassured coach Sangakkara, stating, 'ho jayega,' and then proceeded to keep playoff hopes alive. Sooryavanshi also became the youngest Indian to hit 50 IPL sixes in a season.

title: Air India flight suffers tailstrike while landing at Bengaluru airport
content: An Air India flight experienced a tailstrike upon landing at Bengaluru airport today. While the aircraft touched down safely with all passengers and crew unharmed, such incidents necessitate thorough inspections for structural integrity. The airline confirmed the safe arrival of the plane, with further details pending.

title: Ilaiyaraaja faces setback as Delhi HC upholds ‘En Iniya Pon Nilave’ rights
content: The Delhi High Court upheld an interim injunction favoring Saregama India Limited, ruling that composer Ilaiyaraaja could not assign rights to lyrics or sound recordings of "En Iniya Pon Nilave." The court clarified that while Ilaiyaraaja retains copyright over the musical composition, this does not extend to the lyrics or the sound recording, which Saregama validly acquired.

title: International Tea Day 2026: The storm brewing inside India’s favourite cup
content: India's beloved chai faces unprecedented challenges. Climate stress, rising costs, and global conflicts are impacting tea production and exports, making your daily cup more expensive. Despite these pressures, the nation's deep emotional connection to tea, a symbol of hospitality and connection, ensures its enduring cultural significance.

title: Govt’s proposed anti-doping amendment could send doctors, coaches to jail - Explained
content: The proposed amendments have been uploaded on the sports ministry’s website for public feedback, with June 18 set as the deadline for suggestions.

title: Oath drama in TN: Governor fumes as Congress MLA raises slogans hailing Rajiv Gandhi, Rahul
content: During a Tamil Nadu Cabinet expansion, Governor Arlekar cautioned Congress MLA S. Rajesh Kumar to adhere strictly to the written oath after he deviated to praise party leaders. Kumar, along with other new ministers, took their oaths at Lok Bhavan. Subsequently, other TVK legislators also added party-specific slogans to their affirmations.

title: JEE Advanced response sheets released: Direct link to download here
content: IIT Roorkee has released JEE Advanced 2026 response sheets today, May 21st. Candidates can now access their recorded answers for both papers on the official JEE Advanced website. This release allows students to compare their responses with the upcoming provisional answer key, scheduled for May 25th, to estimate their scores.

title: RG Kar rape-murder case: HC asks CBI to probe 'evidence tampering' charge
content: The Calcutta High Court has ordered the CBI to form a Special Investigation Team to probe allegations of suppression in the R G Kar Medical College rape and murder case. The SIT, led by the CBI's joint director (East), will investigate claims that aspects of the case were "hushed up." A detailed status report is due by June 25.

title: NFL Rumors: Eagles linked to ex-$60M Dolphins WR in free agency
content: Tyreek Hill’s free agency future has become even more complicated after the Philadelphia Eagles were linked to the former Dolphins star in a viral report. While the rumor excited fans, Adam Schefter revealed Hill may not return until midway through the season due to injury concerns. The update could explain why NFL teams remain hesitant to sign the veteran wide receiver despite his elite playmaking ability.

title: Virat Kohli Test comeback loading? Fans erupt after childhood coach’s cryptic remark
content: Speculation about Virat Kohli's potential return to Test cricket has resurfaced following comments from his childhood coach, Rajkumar Sharma. Sharma hinted that discussions regarding a comeback are underway, igniting excitement among fans who believe the former captain still has unfinished business in the longest format. Kohli retired from Test cricket in May 2025 after a distinguished 14-year career.

title: Rupee under pressure: How RBI may try to stabilise the currency
content: The Indian rupee has fallen nearly 6% against the US dollar due to Middle East tensions, prompting the Reserve Bank of India to consider measures like interest rate hikes and attracting dollar inflows. Officials are exploring a foreign currency deposit scheme for NRIs and a potential sovereign dollar bond to stabilize the currency.

title: Iran war lessons: US eyes low-cost cruise missiles; what are India’s plans?
content: Global conflicts highlight the need for affordable, long-range weapons. The US is procuring thousands of new, mass-producible cruise missiles, the Barracuda-500M, for over $2.6 million each. India, too, is seeking similar low-cost, high-volume strike capabilities, including drones and missiles, under its upcoming Defence Acquisition Procedure 2026.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection Day 64: Can Ranveer Singh film net Rs. 1150 crore?
content: With the JioHotstar premiere locked in for June 4, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' is entering the final stretch of its historic theatrical run with India net at Rs. 1,146.35 crore, Rs. 1,150 crore virtually certain, and the 'Pushpa 2' domestic record sitting Rs. 87.75 crore away. With its highly anticipated dual-platform OTT release officially locked for June 4, 2026, the film is racing against time to make the most out its final theatrical run. Amid this, fans looking forward to revisiting the high-octane spy drama can catch it on streaming platforms next month. 'Dhurandhar 2' is opting for a unique dual-platform digital release of JioHotstar premiere on June 4. The movie is already streaming on Netflix under the title 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge — Raw and Uncut', boasting extended graphic sequences.

title: Suo motu case against top Karnataka officials after Lokayukta raids expose illegal sand mining in Bagalkot
content: Director of Mines and Geology Department in Bengaluru, Deputy Director of Mines and Geology in Bagalkot, the Bagalkot Deputy Commissioner, and tahsildars of Badami, Mudhol, Jamakhandi, Hunagund and Ilkal taluks are among those named in case

title: Calcutta High Court asks Bengal government to decide on exemption in animal slaughter rules for Eid ul-Adha
content: A division Bench presided by Chief Justice Sujoy Paul directed that the State shall take a decision in this regard within 24 hours from the date of communication of this order

title: How States are managing the surging summer power demand
content: India’s electricity demand has surged sharply, with peak demand touching an all-time high of 256.1 GW in April, making it harder for States to manage supply during high-demand hours and exposing them to costly short-term market purchases and stressed distribution networks

title: TUDA pooled 400-acre land in one year for development: Chairman
content: Dr. C. Divakar Reddy aims to make the temple city free from traffic problems for the city people as well as the pilgrims

title: 27 Maoists surrender before police in Jharkhand
content: Surrendered Maoists include cadre associated with CPI (Maoist) Central Committee member Misir Besra, top commander Asim Mandal, members of strike squads in the forests of Kolhan and Saranda

title: PM’s five-nation tour delivered concrete outcomes, says Goyal; slams Rahul Gandhi’s ‘traitor’ remark
content: Commerce Minister was responding to LoP Rahul Gandhi’s remarks criticising the PM’s trip and calling him a “traitor”; Goyal accuses Congress of “treachery” for allegedly supporting infiltrators and terrorists

title: Heatwave alert in Nandyal, Kurnool till May 26; Collectors order water, ORS at public places
content: People urged to avoid the afternoon sun and do outdoor work before 9 a.m. or after 5 p.m.; officials told to set up water kiosks, ORS supplies and pots for birds and strays

title: Home Minister orders probe into police action at Malayidomthuruth
content: State Police Chief directed to submit report within three days; cases registered against over 50 persons in connection with the incident

title: Battery energy storage system helps Singareni save ₹26 lakh on energy bills in 4 months
content: SCCL plans to establish more such systems in future to store solar power generated in day, instead of supplying it free of cost to the grid

title: Northern Kerala districts grappling with shortage of Plus One seats again
content: According to the data compiled by Kozhikode-based NGO Malabar Education Movement,  the shortfall of seats is over 26,000 in Malappuram district

title: India calls out Pakistan’s ‘long-tainted record of genocidal acts’ at UNSC
content: Harish Parvathaneni's remarks came after Pakistan’s representative raised the issue of Jammu and Kashmir at the debate.

title: KMRL offers to ease traffic congestion during monsoon
content: More traffic wardens will be deputed at key locations to regulate traffic flow and assist pedestrians. An internal committee has been constituted to continuously monitor traffic safety and coordinate necessary interventions during the monsoon period

title: Four years after putting on hold sedition law, SC says trials can proceed if accused has no objection
content: In May 2022, the top court put on hold trials in sedition cases until the government completed its promised exercise “to re-examine and re-consider” the colonial-era provision of Section 124A

title: SEIL Energy India hosts meet in Nellore
content: About 150 delegates from 30+ companies have participated in the conference on control, instrumentation and automation in thermal power plants

title: Mahila Congress seeks fresh probe into Hathras case, cites revelations in new documentary
content: All India Mahila Congress president Alka Lamba claims the documentary raised ‘serious and disturbing questions’ over the conduct of the police, Hathras district administration and the Uttar Pradesh govt. during the investigation

title: Room for reconciliation within the AIADMK
content: A senior leader of the rebels, who include former Ministers C.Ve. Shanmugam, S.P. Velumani and G. Hari, says that efforts were on “from the beginning” to bring the two camps together

title: Demonstrate ‘speed of doing business’ on the ground, A.P. Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu tells officials
content: Industrial projects approved by SIPB and agreements reached at Partnership Summit must break ground by September this year and commence operations by December 2028, says the Chief Minister, while suggesting a single dashboard to monitor project approvals, grounding status and employment generation

title: Telangana urges Centre to include maize, jowar under PSS
content: Minister Tummala Nageswara Rao urged Union Agri. Minister Shivraj Singh Chouhan to enhance sunflower procurement quota, clear policy on HT cotton

title: Summer footfalls surge in Tirumala as over 4.32 lakh have darshan in last five days
content: In view of rising temperatures, the Tirumala Tirupati Devasthanams erects additional pandals around the temple precincts and along the Mada Streets

title: Rajnath Singh, South Korean Minister Inaugurate Indian War Memorial in Seoul
content: According to the Defence Ministry, the memorial has been constructed to pay tribute to the courage, sacrifice, and humanitarian service of the 60 Para Field Ambulance of the Indian Army and the Custodian Force of India, which played a significant role during and after the Korean War

title: SMC guidelines not applicable to unaided schools, says National Council of CBSE Schools
content: National Council of CBSE Schools says Union Ministry clarified that guidelines are not applicable to unaided schools that do not get government grants. However, schools have been urged to form SMCs  to promote transparency and accountability

title: Jagan flays govt. over fuel prices, Amaravati debt
content: YSRCP chief also criticises CM's call to have more children and accuses TDP-led govt. of encouraging ‘gun culture'

title: A.P. to launch ‘Operation Clean Sweep’ in all 123 ULBs to improve sanitation
content: The four-week initiative, beginning May 23, aims to institutionalise cleanliness as a daily civic responsibility while adopting a mission-mode approach to sanitation

title: Lokayukta books contractor, several officers, including retired engineer, for financial misappropriation
content: Investigators say that the irregularities under the housing for all scheme run to the tune of ₹23 crore

title: Rebate for converting B-Khata to A-Khata hits corporation budgets
content: Previously, the fee was set at 5% of the guidance value of the plot to be regularised, but it has now been reduced to 2% for a 100-day window due to a lack of interest in the scheme

title: Cross-voting allegations trigger blame game within LDF in Kottayam
content: Issue pertains to a post-election steering committee meeting of the Kerala Congress (M), where the leadership alleged that cross-voting by CPI(M) cadres contributed to defeat of its candidates. However, both CPI(M) and CPI have moved to counter the charge in their respective post-poll review meetings, arguing instead that their own candidates did not receive the expected support from KC(M) voters

title: 'We Were Sworn Enemies At One Point': Twisha Sharma's Husband In Wedding Video
content: Twisha Sharma's wedding video: Many friends and relatives speak about the couple, how they met, what kinds of people they are, apart from some jokes and friendly swipes

title: 3 Indians Among 274 To Summit Mount Everest In A Day, Set New Record
content: These climbers, including 150 Nepalese sherpas, reached the summit in a single day, informed Rishi Ram Bhandari, general secretary of the Expedition Operators Association in Nepal.

title: Delhi-NCR Transport Strike May Hit Fruit, Vegetable Supply For 3 Days
content: The transport shutdown began on Thursday and is scheduled to continue on May 21, 22 and 23, with operators protesting against the increase in the Environment Compensation Charge.

title: 'Cockroach Janta Party': Social Media Frenzy Or Just Hype?
content: The massive influx of followers for 'Cockroach Janta Party' has triggered scrutiny, with many pointing to potential bot activity from abroad.

title: India Wants Return Of Stranded Ships Before Sending More To Gulf
content: India said 13 Indian-flagged vessels and one Indian-owned vessel are still stuck on the west side of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Row Over Dearness Allowance In Punjab, Opposition Targets Bhagwant Mann
content: The Opposition has accused the Bhagwant Mann-led Aam Aadmi Party government of intentionally delaying rightful payments, despite several judicial interventions.

title: With Direct Line To Mojtaba, This General Is New Key Player In Iran Talks
content: Brig. Gen. Ahmad Vahidi, who heads Iran's paramilitary Revolutionary Guard, has become a major player in formulating Iran's tough stance in negotiating a possible end to the war.

title: Court Notice To TVK, Poll Body Over Use Of Children In Election Campaign
content: In her petition, Advocate L Vasuki submitted that during the election campaign, the President of TVK allegedly made statements during a public meeting

title: Iran Rebuilding Weapons Base Quickly, Already Producing Drones: Report
content: Sources told CNN that Iran is restoring lost military strength by repairing and replacing missile positions, launch equipment, and the production lines for essential weapons systems damaged in the conflict.

title: Twisha Sharma's In-Laws Hid Phone With Evidence, Recordings From Cops: Friend
content: Twisha Sharma's friends have made allegations including how her husband, Samarth Singh, often insulted her in front of his friends

title: In Twisha Sharma Case, Madhya Pradesh's 'Minus 80 Degrees' Conundrum
content: A Bhopal court stated that for long-term preservation of the body, a temperature of minus 80 degrees Celsius is necessary. However, no morgue in the state offers such an advanced freezer facility

title: "Personal Grudges": Court Sets Aside FIRs Against Ex-Maharashtra Top Cop
content: In the reasoned order available on Thursday, the court asserted that the allegations made by the complainant against the former director general of police (DGP) and others were "vague and lack particulars".

title: Dreams Vs Reality: Delivery Boy's Video Kissing Bat Wins Hearts
content: As the clip spread rapidly across social media platforms, viewers began asking about the identity of the delivery executive.

title: Kerala Forms India's First AI Ministry, PK Kunhalikutty Gets Charge
content: Veteran Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) leader PK Kunhalikutty has been assigned Industries and Commerce, Information Technology, and the newly created Artificial Intelligence department.

title: Inside Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay's "Cabinet Of Firsts"
content: Marking a definitive paradigm shift following the 2026 Assembly elections, the new executive lineup shatters decades of rigid political norms established by the state's traditional heavyweights

title: Opinion: Opinion | Unmarked Vans, 'OMR' Tricks, 'Solver-For-Hires': The Dark Underbelly Of Multi-Crore NEET Scams
content: Beneath the answer sheets and OMR bubbles, beneath the invigilators and sealed envelopes, lies a system so fragile and so compromised that it has become a multi-crore auction.

title: Another Accused In Suvendu Adhikari Aide's Murder Arrested From UP
content: In a joint operation with the Uttar Pradesh Police, the CBI arrested Singh following specific inputs about his alleged involvement in Rath's murder in West Bengal on May 6, officials mentioned.

title: Air France, Airbus Found Guilty Of Manslaughter In 2009 Crash That Killed 228
content: The Paris Court of Appeal ruled that the French flag carrier and Europe's leading aerospace manufacturer were "solely and entirely responsible," ordering each to pay 225,000 euros ($261,000).

title: Cops Gained Total Control Of Situation: D Fadnavis On Bandra Stone-Throwing
content: The Mumbai Police on Thursday arrested 16 individuals for allegedly pelting stones and paver blocks at police personnel during the anti-encroachment drive conducted near Bandra railway station (East) on Wednesday.

title: Calcutta High Court Orders Fresh Probe Into RG Kar Rape-Murder Case
content: The court ordered the formation of a three-member Special Investigation Team of the CBI to reinvestigate the evidence tampering claims.
